title: Deploy application to Internet Computer mainnet

requirements.text: Deploy the application to the Internet Computer mainnet so it is publicly accessible with a production canister URL
acceptanceCriteria: Application is deployed to Internet Computer mainnet
All canisters (frontend and backend) are running on mainnet
Application is accessible via a public canister URL
Internet Identity authentication works with mainnet deployment
All existing features (product catalog, order system, admin dashboard) function correctly on mainnet

constraints: Must maintain all existing functionality during deployment
Must use Internet Computer mainnet, not local replica
Must preserve all existing data structures and state
nonGoals: Modifying any application features or UI
Changing backend logic or data models
